summary: Iteration 34: Frontend-only testing of Dashboard color coordination and Loadout Builder fleet toggle. All features working correctly.

issues: React hydration warnings for span inside select/option - cosmetic only, functionality unaffected

passed_tests: DASHBOARD: Page loads correctly after login with fleet data
DASHBOARD: Fleet stats showing 10 Ships, 0 Vehicles, 0 Loadouts, 6 Manufacturers
DASHBOARD: Favorite Manufacturer section displays 'Aegis Dynamics' as #1 with '3 ships · 30% of fleet'
DASHBOARD: Other manufacturers (Drake, RSI, Anvil, Crusader) shown with colored percentage bars
DASHBOARD: Fleet filter tabs (All/Ships/Land) visible and clickable
DASHBOARD: Category filters (Size, Type, Manufacturer, Storage) all present
DASHBOARD: Fleet cards show ship names with manufacturer-coordinated colors (cyan for Aegis, orange for RSI, purple for Anvil, etc.)
DASHBOARD: Manufacturer names on fleet cards have matching color styling with reduced opacity
LOADOUT BUILDER: 'All Ships' and 'My Fleet (10)' toggle buttons displayed correctly
LOADOUT BUILDER: 'My Fleet' filter correctly shows only 10 fleet ships
LOADOUT BUILDER: Toggle switching between modes works correctly
LOADOUT BUILDER: Ship selection (Avenger Titan) opens loadout builder UI with 7 slots
LOADOUT BUILDER: Equip button opens item selector modal with compatible components
LOGIN: Login flow with credentials newpilot/test1234 works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard mfgColorMap correctly assigns MFG_COLORS to top 5 manufacturers
FleetCard component receives mfgColor prop and applies it to both ship name (h3 style) and manufacturer text
Loadout Builder fleetOnly state correctly filters ships using fleetShipIds Set
Fleet toggle shows accurate count using fleetShipIds.size
seed_data_creation: Used existing fleet data for user 'newpilot' with 10 ships from 6 manufacturers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 verified Dashboard color coordination and Loadout Builder fleet toggle. User 'newpilot' has 10 ships: Avenger Titan, Gladius, Hammerhead (Aegis), Caterpillar, Cutlass Black (Drake), Aurora MR, Constellation Andromeda (RSI), Arrow (Anvil), Mercury Star Runner (Crusader), Freelancer (MISC). Dashboard shows Aegis Dynamics as favorite with 30%. Loadout Builder correctly filters to show only fleet ships when 'My Fleet' toggle is active. MFG_COLORS array: ['#00D4FF' (cyan), '#D4AF37' (gold), '#FF6B35' (orange), '#A855F7' (purple), '#00FF9D' (green)].
